name: Pro Maple Cue
description: Canadian maple shaft, leather tip, balanced for smooth strokes.
highlights: Canadian maple shaft with pro taper
19–21 oz weight range, ideal for daily play

name: Carbon Break Cue
description: Lightweight carbon fiber break cue with explosive power transfer.
highlights: Carbon fiber construction for maximum transfer
Hard phenolic tip for break shots

name: Jump Cue 42"
description: Compact jump cue for clearing obstacles with precision.

name: Aramith Pro Ball Set
description: Tournament-grade phenolic resin balls, 2¼" standard size.
highlights: Phenolic resin — same material used in pro tournaments
High-gloss finish holds up for years

name: Training Ball Set
description: Marked practice balls for aiming drills and spin control.
highlights: Marked with aim points and contact zones
Great for learning spin and draw
Durable resin for club and home tables

name: Master Chalk (12 pcs)
description: Premium blue chalk cubes — less miscue, longer hold.
highlights: Classic blue, works on all tip types

name: Taom Soft Chalk
description: Low-kick formula favored by pros. One cube lasts longer.
highlights: Soft formula — less miscue on draw shots

name: Pro Bridge Glove
description: Smooth Lycra bridge glove for a friction-free stroke.
highlights: Stretch Lycra fits most hand sizes
Reduces cue drag through the bridge hand

name: Hard Cue Case (2×2)
description: Protects two butts and two shafts with padded dividers.

name: Soft Cue Sleeve
description: Lightweight nylon sleeve with shoulder strap.
highlights: Lightweight for travel to the club

name: Table Brush Set
description: Horsehair brush and rail cleaner for felt maintenance.
highlights: Extends cloth life with regular use

name: Fitted Table Cover
highlights: Protects felt from dust and spills
